examples.subject: Re: UserLoop | Customer Asked to be Contacted for Pre-Sale Help & Tech Support
examples.cleanedReply:
Hello Patrick,

Thank you for your purchase and feedback! Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns. I'd be happy to assist.

Moreover, If you'd kindly be interested, I'd be more than happy to speak with you over the phone to discuss this in more detail. Please use this link to schedule a call with me at your convenience. 

Best,

sopMatches.title: Product Feedback Outreach for eCommerce
sopMatches.excerpt:
Product Feedback Outreach for eCommerce

💡 The purpose of this SOP is to offer guidance for the eCommerce team on how our Product Feedback program will be carried out so we can gather as much constructive feedback from as many customers as we can possibly speak to!

We only contact customers who purchase Waveform 2x2 and 4x4 MIMO Panel and Log Periodic Directional Antenna Kits.

For more detailed information from the product team, you can refer to this SOP:

Our process:

sopMatches.title: Case study requests
sopMatches.excerpt:
Case study requests

Case studies are invaluable resources that we use to reach new markets, prove our expertise, and showcase our excellent work.

Getting the info we need from clients can sometimes be daunting, so here's how to go about that.

If you need assistance or have any questions, feel free to reach out to Marcus.

Requesting a case study:

It's important to be open and upfront, and prioritize the value it holds for them and other people like them. 

Best practices:

sopMatches.title: Drift chat
sopMatches.excerpt:
Drift chat

Live chat with customers that are active on our website is a great opportunity to proactively engage customers while they're actively interested in our products, or in need of support. 

General Best Practices

There's an art to engaging customers with a live chat, and by the time you're live at Waveform you'll have had plenty of guidance and practice, so you should be a pro. 

Nonetheless, a couple notes: 

Documentation, documentation, documentation! Leave thorough notes in PipeDrive and Locate as necessary, to make life easier for yourself and your team down the road.
Chat is in

sopMatches.title: E-Commerce Escalations
sopMatches.excerpt:
E Commerce Escalations

Your leaders are here to support you! Whenever you're unsure about a process, how to approach a situation, or need to run something by someone, we're here to help! 

We will always try to reach the ideal solution for the customer, while also considering the impact and cost to the business. 

General

You should always feel confident to escalate any issues you face with a customer. We're a team and your managers are here to help! The end goal is a happy customer, which will always be the focus of our escalated discussions.
